channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Violence in Jacobabad Leaves Over 100 Homes Destroyed After Inter-Community Marriage Dispute
item.description: In Jacobabad district of Sindh, over 100 homes were set on fire following a violent dispute over a free-will marriage between a 14-year-old girl from the Channa community and Muhammad Hassan Buriro fr...

item.title: Greg Brockman Assumes Leadership of OpenAI's Product Strategy Amid CEO Medical Leave
item.description: OpenAI co-founder and president Greg Brockman has officially taken over the company’s product strategy, stepping in while CEO of AGI deployment, Fidji Simo, is on medical leave. This move formalizes B...

item.title: Researchers develop diabetes treatment from Warburgia salutaris while promoting conservation
item.description: Researchers at the University of Johannesburg (UJ) are investigating a compound derived from Warburgia salutaris, a tree traditionally used across Southern Africa for medicinal purposes, as a compleme...

item.title: New Brunswick expands healthcare options for residents without family doctors
item.description: New Brunswick has announced a significant initiative aimed at providing healthcare access to residents who do not currently have family doctors. The provincial government is implementing a comprehensi...

item.title: Durban Woman Linked to Standerton Drug Lab Hands Herself Over to Hawks
item.description: Over a year after authorities uncovered over R3,6 million hidden in the boot of a car during a raid on a clandestine drug laboratory in Standerton, a Durban woman, Sandra Pillay, 53, has surrendered t...

item.title: Tensions between Meghan Markle and Kate Middleton over royal protocol and bridesmaid's dress highlighted during wedding preparations
item.description: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry's wedding in May 2018 was widely described as a 'fairytale', yet behind the scenes tensions simmered, particularly between Meghan and the Princess of Wales, Catherine. A...

item.title: PM Modi Warns Global Crises Could Undermine Decades of Progress, Highlights India’s Growth
item.description: During his visit to The Hague in the Netherlands, Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed the Indian diaspora, emphasising the serious challenges facing the world today. He highlighted how the aftermat...

item.title: Brooklyn Beckham's Confidence and Passion Make Him an Unconventional Role Model
item.description: Brooklyn Beckham has frequently been criticised as a 'nepo baby', yet he continues to pursue activities that bring him joy without concern for public opinion. Unlike other privileged individuals who m...

item.title: Sydney’s auction clearance rate falls as federal tax changes hit housing market
item.description: The Sydney property auction market experienced a notable slowdown over the past weekend, with fewer than half of listed homes successfully selling. Preliminary data from Cotality shows the city’s clea...

item.title: Bulgarian Singer Dara Secures Country’s First Eurovision Victory Amid Controversy
item.description: Bulgarian singer Dara triumphed at the 70th Eurovision Song Contest in Vienna, taking home the country’s first-ever victory with her lively anthem “Bangaranga.” Dara outperformed 24 other competitors,...

item.title: Montreal Residents Prepare for Opening of New West Island REM Branch
item.description: Montreal commuters are eagerly preparing for the opening of the new West Island branch of the Réseau express métropolitain (REM). Anticipation is high as residents seek convenient transit options to n...

item.title: 'Call of My Life': Nollywood Rom-Com with Heart and Familiar Characters
item.description: Na so 'Call of My Life', one Nollywood romantic comedy, take shine well-well with im warm and culturally grounded story. Di film show Soluchi, one babe wey dey in relationship with Kalu, wey be reliab...

item.title: Gatundu Family Seeks Help After Missing Son Appears in Congo Video
item.description: For nearly a decade, the Ndarwa family from Muthurumbi village in Gatundu South lived with the pain and uncertainty of losing their son, Peter Ndarwa, who disappeared mysteriously ten years ago. Recen...

item.title: India and Netherlands Forge Strategic Partnership to Strengthen Semiconductor and Security Ties
item.description: During Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit to The Hague, Dutch Foreign Minister Tom Berendsen emphasised the growing strategic partnership between India and the Netherlands. The discussions focused o...

item.title: David Fizdale Officially Appointed As Head Coach Of Nigeria's D’Tigers
item.description: The Nigeria Basketball Federation (NBBF) don officially announce say David Fizdale go be the new head coach of D’Tigers. Fizdale, wey dey 51 years old, na Los Angeles pikin, don serve as NBA head coac...

item.title: Ronda Rousey Defeats Gina Carano Quickly in Return Fight After a Decade
item.description: Ronda Rousey made a remarkable return to mixed martial arts on Saturday, submitting Gina Carano in just 17 seconds with her trademark armbar. The bout marked Rousey’s first fight in 10 years and Caran...

item.title: Senator Onyonka's Children Lighten Mood at Late Mother's Burial with Humorous Introductions
item.description: In Kisii, Senator Richard Onyonka recently laid his mother, Mama Teresia Nyaboke, to rest at the age of 81. Mama Teresia was celebrated for her faith, humility, and wisdom, which Senator Onyonka said ...

item.title: Nairobi Court Sentences Man for 2019 Family Assault Case
item.description: A Nairobi court has finally delivered justice in a long-standing family assault case dating back to 2019. Arvinder Singh Gill was sentenced to one year in prison after assaulting his cousin, DS Gill, ...

item.title: Winnipeg Police Locate Missing 10-Year-Old Child Safely
item.description: Winnipeg police have successfully located a 10-year-old child who was reported missing earlier on May 16, 2026. Authorities launched an immediate search after receiving the report, utilizing local pat...

item.title: Delhi sees second CNG price increase in two days, now ₹80.09 per kg
item.description: In Delhi, the price of Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) has seen yet another increase, with a rise of ₹1 per kg, marking the second hike in just 48 hours. This adjustment, effective from May 17, 2026, bri...
